deck.name: Yorùbá Core
deck.description: The highest-frequency Yorùbá words and phrases — greetings, pronouns, numbers, verbs, daily life, culture.

phrases.yoruba: Inú mi dùn láti mọ̀ ọ́
Ṣé o lè ràn mí lọ́wọ́?
Ṣé o lè sọ ọ́ lẹ́ẹ̀kan sí i?
Ọjọ́ ìbí rẹ á ku ire

phrases.english: You are the ones I came to meet (arriving phrase)

phrases.yoruba: A kì í rí ọjọ́ ibi bí ìyá
phrases.english: No one has a rough day like a mother (proverb)

phrases.yoruba: Bí ọmọdé bá mọ ọwọ́ wẹ̀
phrases.english: When a child knows how to wash their hands (proverb — they dine with elders)

phrases.yoruba: Àgbà kìí wà lọ́jà kí orí ọmọ tuntun wọ́
phrases.english: Elders don't stand at the market while a newborn's head tilts (proverb)
A person of good character (Yorùbá ideal)
Happy festive season (compliments of the season)
Joyous public shout / cry of joy

phrases.yoruba: Ẹ má ṣe tì wá sílẹ̀
phrases.english: Don't leave us behind (stay / come celebrate)
